CREATE TABLE test_datetime64 (event_time String, timestamp UInt32, datetime64_sample DateTime64(3));
SELECT toDateTime64(event_time, 3) AS value FROM test_datetime64 WHERE event_time LIKE '1955%';
SELECT toTypeName(toDateTime64(timestamp, 3)) AS type FROM test_datetime64 WHERE timestamp > 1546300800;
WITH (SELECT toDateTime64('2020-01-01 00:00:00.000', 5)) AS temp_dt SELECT value, toTypeName(value) FROM (SELECT toDateTime64('2020-01-01 00:00:00.000', 5) AS value);
SELECT a.event_time, toDateTime64(b.timestamp, 3) FROM test_datetime64 a JOIN test_datetime64 b ON a.timestamp = b.timestamp;
SELECT toDateTime64(toString(timestamp), 3) AS converted FROM (SELECT timestamp FROM test_datetime64);
WITH (SELECT toDateTime64('2023-01-01 00:00:00.123456', 6)) AS high_precision_dt SELECT toTypeName(high_precision_dt);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT toDateTime64('2022-02-28 23:59:59.999', 3) AS dt) WHERE dt IS NOT NULL;
